metadata.title: Better File Link
metadata.description: A plugin to add better external file links to notes.

regex.source: setDesc("Will show file endings when activated."
regex.target: setDesc("激活时将显示文件结尾。"

regex.source: setDesc("Will copy the file to Obsidian and embed it in the note."
regex.target: setDesc("将文件复制到 Obsidian 并将其嵌入笔记中。"
setName("链接文件夹而不是文件"

regex.source: setDesc("Link will open the folder where the file is located instead of opening the file itself."
regex.target: setDesc("链接将打开文件所在的文件夹，而不是打开文件本身。"

regex.source: setDesc("Use short links instead of long links."
regex.target: setDesc("使用短链接而不是长链接。"

regex.source: setDesc("Specify the characters shown before every file link."
regex.target: setDesc("指定每个文件链接之前显示的字符。"

regex.source: Notice("Files of this type are not supported for embedding in Obsidian.")
regex.target: Notice("此檔案類型無法在 Obsidian 中嵌入。.")
Notice("選取檔案時發生錯誤: " + error_1.message)

regex.source: .setDesc("Specify the characters shown before every file link.")
regex.target: .setDesc("指定在每個檔案連結前顯示的字元.")
.setDesc("啟用後，會顯示檔案的副檔名.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Will copy the file to Obsidian and embed it in the note.")
regex.target: .setDesc("會將檔案複製到 Obsidian 裡，並將它嵌入到筆記中.")

regex.source: .setDesc("Link will open the folder where the file is located instead of opening the file itself.")
regex.target: .setDesc("點擊連結後，會開啟檔案所在的資料夾，而不是開啟檔案本身.")
